title: Berisfords 3501 15mm 60 Dusky Pink Double Satin Ribbon x 20mtr, 20m
features: Can be used to decorate gifts, greeting cards, attaching to gift tags, home decor, plus many more craft projects
Measures 20 metre length by 15 mm width
description: Product Description Article 3501 classic and versatile ribbon made from 100 percent polyester yarn. Satin ribbon is the core product in the essentials collection from Berisford. Can be used to decorate gifts, greeting cards, attaching to gift tags, home decor, plus many more craft projects. The ribbon is machine washable, wash as synthetics at 50 percent cool iron, do not bleach, it can also be ironed, tumble dried and dye cleaned, thus making it very versatile. Available in dusky pink colour. Box Contains 1 x 20 metre Length Ribbon Reel
